title: RUSTINS Textured Step & Tile Paint 500ml Black
description: From the manufacturer Quick Dry Textured Step & Tile Rustins Quick Dry Textured Step and Tile Paint- A quick dry water-based paint that contains textured agents to improve the slip resistance in wet and dry conditions on tiles, concrete and bricks. It is independently tested and rated as low slip potential according to BS7976, Part 2, 2002 assessment of slip resistance. Hard wearing, durable & weather resistant. Available in Red and Black 500ml Water-based Textured finish Interior & exterior Hard wearing, durable & weather resistant About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London.
